front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Ether Annihilator — the 3rd advancement of the Memory Breaker class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: ultimate Memory Breaker with ether crystal full plate armor, broken memory wings on back (damaged but luminous), ether greatsword with blade composed of unstable flickering memory fragments, red (#FF0000) crack energy added to ether blue, air distortion around body, memory fragment particles scattering at feet. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
